title: Sport chip
description: Compact display chip showing sport icon + colored dot + name + optional category. Rendered in Team detail views, AthleteEnrollment cards, Event listings, roster rows — everywhere a sport_key needs a human-readable label. Not interactive — pure display.
notes: Uses HeroUI `Chip` — no bespoke class-name literals per the ui-components rule.
The primary chip's background color comes from Sport.primary_color; the icon renders via Iconify with Sport.icon as the identifier.
When `showCategory=true`, appends a subordinate category chip in the neutral variant.

sportKey.description: Sport slug — the widget hydrates the row via SportKeyResolver.
